action: Recover and structure the project-wide evolution of completion semantics.

result.finding: Completion is an evidence-gated vector, not artifact existence or a single boolean.
result.privacy_boundary: public repository metadata and abstract project semantics only

evidence.verification: GitHub contents API accepted the UTF-8 JSON artifact and returned an immutable commit SHA.

next_action: Define a reusable evidence-dimension schema and a read-only mapper from queue required_evidence strings to standardized dimensions.
